title: Sales Manager Vacancy at CREDAI - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at CREDAI - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
